cves.name: Windows RDL Remote Code Execution
cves.description: Critical RCE vulnerability in Windows Remote Desktop Licensing Service. Unauthenticated attacker can execute arbitrary code over the network.
cves.remediation: Apply Microsoft security update KB5040442 immediately.

cves.name: Microsoft Outlook NTLM Hash Leak
cves.description: Zero-click vulnerability allows attackers to capture NTLM credential hashes by sending a specially crafted email. No user interaction required.

cves.name: Windows Kernel Privilege Escalation
cves.description: Local privilege escalation in the Windows Kernel via improperly handled objects. Allows attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

cves.name: Windows MSHTML Platform Spoofing
cves.description: Spoofing vulnerability in the Windows MSHTML platform allows attackers to trick users into executing malicious code via a crafted URL.

cves.name: Windows Error Reporting EoP
cves.description: Elevation of privilege vulnerability in the Windows Error Reporting Service allows local attackers to gain SYSTEM-level access.
